title: National Gas Pipeline Explosion
description: A major gas pipeline explosion disrupts energy supply across several regions.

A.title: Shut down all pipelines for inspection

B.title: Repair the damaged pipeline and increase monitoring

C.title: Let private companies handle the crisis

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Pipeline explosions are catastrophic. We need full inspections immediately.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Full shutdowns cripple the economy. Repairs and monitoring are more balanced.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Balance doesn’t matter if another explosion happens.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: But shutting everything down creates shortages that hurt millions.
